query:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS count,
                       MIN(scheduled_for) AS oldest_job,
                       COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE canceled_by IS NOT NULL) AS canceled_count,
                       MIN(scheduled_for) FILTER (WHERE canceled_by IS NOT NULL) AS canceled_oldest
                FROM v2_job_queue
                WHERE tag = $1
                  AND scheduled_for <= NOW() - $2::interval
                  AND running = false
